name: Rahul Sharma
summary: Final-year B.Tech student specializing in AI/ML systems with hands-on experience building local LLM pipelines, multimodal RAG frameworks, and production-grade Python systems. Passionate about privacy-first AI and edge computing.

bullets: Built a real-time video analytics pipeline processing 30 FPS on edge hardware
Reduced model inference latency by 40% using quantization and batching techniques
Deployed FastAPI microservice serving ML predictions to 3 downstream teams

projects.name: VidChain — Forensic Video Intelligence Suite
projects.description: Multimodal RAG framework for forensic video analysis using local LLMs, GraphRAG, and multi-sensor fusion. Built edge-optimized B.A.B.U.R.A.O. engine for consumer GPU inference.

projects.name: Jarvis — Private AI Job Assistant
projects.description: Fully local AI assistant for job applications. Generates tailored emails, customizes resume content, and scores job relevance — all offline using Ollama + Mistral.

education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering (AI/ML Specialization)
